renders/aqua-elite/cutouts/0.png.key_features: This image shows the product folded and stored vertically, highlighting its compact form factor and the touchscreen's position.

renders/aqua-elite/cutouts/1.png.key_features: This image provides a clear profile view of the entire rowing machine, highlighting the light wood frame, black rail, and the illuminated water tank with the touchscreen.

renders/aqua-elite/cutouts/2.png.key_features: Full product view from the front_3_4 angle, showing the display screen, water tank, and the SPORTSTECH logo clearly.

renders/aqua-elite/cutouts/3.png.key_features: Clear profile view of the entire rowing machine, highlighting the wood frame, water tank, touchscreen, and branding.

renders/aqua-elite/cutouts/4.png.key_features: Full product view from the front-three-quarter angle, showing the display, water tank, and branding.
